title: Midnight Flaky Zesty British Rice Fish And Chips
description: A nutty, flaky, midnight-craving British dish featuring carnaroli rice, toast, and the classic combination of fish and chips. Perfect for a late-night snack with a crispy twist.
instructions: In a large paella pan, toast 1 cup of carnaroli rice over medium heat until slightly nutty and lightly browned.
Add 2 cups of water to the rice and bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
In a separate pan, heat 1/4 cup of oil over medium heat and add the flaked sardines, cooking until lightly browned and crispy.
Remove the rice from heat and stir in 1 tablespoon of mayonnaise and 1 teaspoon of lemon juice.
Transfer the rice to a serving dish and top with the crispy sardines and toasted bread.
